name: cursor-agent-bridge
description: Cursor Agent Bridge — API, Mobile UI, Auto-Update, MCP-Orchestrierung

scripts.build: node scripts/generate-control-tokens.js && npm run build -w @bridge/ui -w @bridge/ui-cursor && npm run build -w @bridge/shared -w @bridge/cursor-adapter -w bridge-cli -w bridge-mcp-server -w bridge-api -w bridge-web -w cursor-agent-bridge && node scripts/generate-version.js && node scripts/generate-catalog.js
scripts.install:plugins: npm run build -w @bridge/shared -w bridge-cli -w bridge-mcp-server -w cursor-agent-bridge && node cli/dist/index.js plugins install-all
scripts.dev:api: npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.package:extension: npm run build -w cursor-agent-bridge && cd extension && npx --yes @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies
scripts.test:p0: npm test -w @bridge/shared && npm test -w @bridge/cursor-adapter && npm test -w bridge-api && npm test -w cursor-agent-bridge
